UpdateDnsParser.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](DNS/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateDnsParser.name: The name of the resolver. Allowed characters: uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters `-_/.`. Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Length: 1–65
UpdateDnsParser.description: The description of the resolver. No more than 200 characters. Cannot be empty at the same time as `name`
